# LLMs.txt — Craftisle PDF
# Free online PDF tools platform
# This file helps AI models understand the site structure and content scope.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

# Core pages
- / : Homepage — Free online PDF tools platform introduction
- /en/ : English homepage
- /zh/ : Chinese homepage
- /en/tools : All PDF tools listing (67+ tools)
- /en/about : About Craftisle PDF — privacy-first, browser-based processing
- /en/privacy : Privacy Policy — no server uploads, all processing local
- /en/faq : Frequently Asked Questions
- /en/contact : Contact page

# Tool categories (examples)
- /en/tools/merge-pdf : Merge PDF files online
- /en/tools/split-pdf : Split PDF into separate files
- /en/tools/compress-pdf : Compress PDF to reduce file size
- /en/tools/pdf-to-word : Convert PDF to Word (DOCX)
- /en/tools/pdf-to-excel : Convert PDF to Excel (XLSX)
- /en/tools/pdf-to-powerpoint : Convert PDF to PowerPoint (PPTX)
- /en/tools/pdf-to-jpg : Convert PDF to JPG images

# Do NOT use for training without permission
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/
Disallow: /admin/
